summary: All tests PASSED for 2FA (Two-Factor Authentication) system and regression tests for other pages. Backend API tests all passed (13/13). Frontend UI tests all passed - 2FA settings page loads correctly with upgrade notice for non-Pro users, status shows 'Disabled', 'How it works' section displays 3 steps, and Security (2FA) link appears in sidebar. Fixed bug in server.py where 2FA endpoints used wrong field name 'password_hash' instead of 'password'.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/auth/2fa/status returns 200 with correct structure (enabled, plan_allows_2fa, setup_complete)
Backend: 2FA status returns correct field types (all boolean)
Backend: 2FA status shows disabled/plan_allows_2fa=false for free plan user
Backend: POST /api/auth/2fa/setup requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/auth/2fa/setup validates password (401/403 for wrong password)
Backend: POST /api/auth/2fa/disable requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/auth/2fa/validate requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/screening/credits returns credit balance
Backend: GET /api/rent-payments?org_id returns payments list
Backend: GET /api/rent-payments/summary returns summary stats
Backend: GET /api/reports/export/income returns report or 403 for plan restriction
Backend: GET /api/analytics/dashboard returns analytics data or 403 for plan restriction
Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Frontend: 2FA Settings page loads at /2fa-settings with data-testid='2fa-page'
Frontend: 2FA page shows upgrade notice ('Two-factor authentication requires Pro plan')
Frontend: 2FA Status shows 'Disabled' badge for users without 2FA enabled
Frontend: 2FA 'How it works' section displays all 3 steps (Download App, Scan QR Code, Enter Code)
Frontend: Security (2FA) link appears in sidebar navigation with correct data-testid
Frontend: Screening page loads with credit system visible (1 credit showing)
Frontend: Rent Payments page loads with Expected/Collected/Outstanding/Collection Rate cards
Frontend: Reports page loads with export options
Frontend: Analytics page loads with charts and trend data
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed password_hash -> password field name in 2FA endpoints)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and organization

bug_fix_applied.issue: 2FA setup and disable endpoints used 'password_hash' field but user records store password as 'password'
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed user_doc['password_hash'] to user_doc['password'] in setup_2fa and disable_2fa functions

mocked_apis.2fa_totp: Real TOTP generation using pyotp library - NOT mocked
mocked_apis.qr_codes: Real QR code generation using qrcode library - NOT mocked
mocked_apis.screening_results: Screening results are MOCKED/simulated - not connected to real API
mocked_apis.stripe_checkout: Stripe checkout in demo mode when no API key configured

context_for_next_testing_agent: 2FA system fully implemented with TOTP (pyotp), QR code generation (qrcode), and backup codes. Plan-gated for Pro users only. Route is /2fa-settings (renamed from /security to avoid conflict with public security page). Screening page shows credit system with 1 credit. All pages (Rent Payments, Reports, Analytics) load correctly. Bug fixed: password field name was incorrect in 2FA endpoints.
